message:
Implement slb watch command for reviewing agents (bead f4c.5)

Add internal/daemon/ipc_client.go with:
- IPCClient for communicating with daemon via Unix socket
- Methods: Connect, Close, Ping, Status, Notify, Subscribe
- Event streaming with subscription support
- RequestStreamEvent type for structured watch output

Add internal/cli/watch.go implementing:
- NDJSON event streaming to stdout
- Real-time events via daemon IPC subscription when available
- Database polling fallback when daemon not running
- --auto-approve-caution flag for auto-approving CAUTION tier
- --session-id flag for reviewer attribution
- Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM

Event types: request_pending, request_approved, request_rejected,
request_executed, request_timeout, request_cancelled

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
